---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new functionality or a design change.
title: ""
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What's missing or awkward today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see instead.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you didn't pick them.

## Does this touch the threat model?

If this changes what data is committed on-chain, what's proven versus
disclosed, or any trust assumption — say so explicitly and reference
`docs/THREAT_MODEL.md`.
